name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Blacklist lifted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The blacklist is over which opens the door to strengthen our party. Help us give them a fighting chance.
#
We have good news.
The official campaign arm of House Democrats (the DCCC) announced that**they will officially end a policy blacklisting anyone who works on a primary challenger’s campaign**.
You may remember that in 2019 after Alexandria’s upset victory, the DCCC announced they would blacklist vendors and experts who worked with candidates that primaried incumbents – a policy that made it much harder for progressive challengers and working-class candidates of color from outside the D.C. bubble to get the resources, staff, and tools they need to be competitive.
**Alexandria spoke out against the ban from the outset, and yesterday it was announced that the policy is officially ended.** She called this an “enormous win” that opens the door to leverage strength from every corner of the party and gives voters a choice on who they want to represent their communities.
[We have a new opening for progressive challengers, but we need the resources to give them a fighting chance. Will you chip in $6 to help us support more candidates in 2022 and elect the next generation of progressives to Congress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8143?refcode=em20210310-1939&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK)
**[Contribute $6](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8143?refcode=em20210310-1939&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK)**
With this policy gone, progressive challengers can work with the grassroots organizing firms and partners they choose including newer vendors from outside the D.C. establishment with more diverse, grassroots backgrounds. **But they need resources to hire staff and build their campaigns.**
Alexandria knows firsthand how difficult it is for working-class candidates to get their campaigns off the ground – and that’s why we need your help.
There will be many contentious primaries in the 2022 cycle and we must start preparing now. In addition, redistricting will almost certainly place members and candidates in new territory that could make them more vulnerable.
[**Our movement has helped challengers like Jamaal Bowman break through the establishment firewall — can you chip in $6 to help elect more progressive champions?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8143?refcode=em20210310-1939&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK)
Primary challengers help us build a stronger party that is more durable and representative of constituents. With your help, we can provide the biggest possible support system for progressive candidates in 2022.
Thanks for stepping up.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210310-1939-footer&t=23&refcode2=1939_2526796_z4zzOK&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1939%2E2526796%2Ez4zzOK). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
subject: Gavin Newsom doesn’t have a clue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Gavin Newsom showed us once again that he is completely out-of-touch with real Californians. Read more >>
Peter, Did you see Gavin Newsom’s State of the State address to Californians last night? _He just doesn’t get it._ Newsom has failed California by epic proportions, yet he goes on TV to flash his smile and talk about how “we’re all in this together.” We’re not all in this together while Newsom keeps public schools closed, while sending his own four young children to in-person private schools. We’re not in this together when businesses have been forced to close their doors forever due to Newsom’s lockdowns, yet he enjoys an indoor dinner at The French Laundry to the tune of $400 a plate. **_We’ve never been in this together_ , and Californians are starting to wake up and realize that Governor Newsom is just another out-of-touch elitist who has never had their best interests at heart.** That’s why the Recall Newsom effort has exploded, and why Kevin Faulconer is going to beat him at the ballot box to become your next governor. **If you’re ready to help Recall Gavin Newsom and elect a real leader like Kevin Faulconer, please send your best gift now.** [**CHIP IN FOR A CALIFORNIA COMEBACK >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/4498514bc3406ac5c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Real, hardworking Californians have sacrificed enough already. It’s time to elect a leader who will stop playing partisan games and put them first. Kevin Faulconer is the leader for the job. For California,
Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/eaad0c35cae004f4c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/13bb0b2713847ad3c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/2f10a4ad9317bd45c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/ec673250aa6dce58c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/5669cae4a4990a95c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/0752b6974511bb58c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f608261b44dcca5e/61cebf5c5ed3b54cc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

| | | Friend, —

In case you missed it... there are only 60 days left until Virginia Republicans will face one of their most important decisions in a generation: who will face off with the far-left radicals that Virginia Democrats nominate to replace King Ralph and Justin Fairfax.

[Can I count on you to contribute $60 for 60 days until the convention? ](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=696f657e3c&e=a4aff4086b)

Winsome Sears
Candidate for Lt. Governor

SUBJECT: Only 60 Days to Save the Commonwealth!

Dear Friend,

In just 60 days, Virginia Republicans will face one of their most important decisions in a generation: who will face off with the far-left radicals that Virginia Democrats nominate to replace King Ralph and Justin Fairfax.

As a Marine and the first Republican since 1865 to represent a majority-black district in the House of Delegates, I know what it takes to get the job done and I will not be outworked as your Republican nominee for Lieutenant Governor. In order to win in November, however,**I need YOUR help in securing our Party’s nomination at the convention which is only two months away.**

Can I count on you to contribute $60 for 60 days until the convention?
---
| [YES, I’ll contribute $60, Winsome!](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=7d32d7ad4f&e=a4aff4086b)

[Chip in $75](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=8490b13e8c&e=a4aff4086b)

[Chip in $150](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=d3a669a05a&e=a4aff4086b)

[Chip in $250](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=144d3dad3a&e=a4aff4086b)
Democrats in Richmond are just getting started imposing their dangerous, far-left policies on the Commonwealth, and we need Virginia Republicans that aren’t afraid to take them to task.

I cannot and will not stand by any longer as they continue releasing murderers onto our streets, imposing mandates on our people and businesses, and inch Virginia closer to the likes of New York and California than the Commonwealth we all call home.

We will not surrender Virginia, surrender is not a Marine word, and surrender is not a conservative word!

Semper Fi Winsome Sears
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Democrats’ “Election Reform Bill”
body:
America deserves better. No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Democrats' "Election Reform Bill" is Anything But](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Don't be fooled. The "For the People Act of 2021" is actually a recipe for more election fraud. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Biden Finally Gets One Right](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-d/)
Joe Biden has gotten so many things wrong in his first 6 weeks as President. Read this week about one thing I think he's gotten right. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Grab Your Wallets](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-u/)
The latest so-called COVID relief bill is a liberal wish list of pork and wasteful spending. And only 9% of the money goes towards combating COVID! Read about it here in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Half the World](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlxkdlk-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Foreign Affairs Subcommittee on Asia and the Pacific has jurisdiction over half the earth's surface and more than half the world's population. I was just named the Lead Republican (Ranking Member) of the committee in the upcoming Congress. China will be a particular focus of attention. You can read about it in this week's blog. body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

It is no secret that American’s have suffered needlessly. A politicized pandemic ravaged our nation as Republican leadership pretended it wasn’t real. That’s all about to change. Tomorrow afternoon President Biden is going to sign into law a 1.9 Trillion Dollar relief plan. With Democrats in charge, those suffering will be taken care of. With Democrats in charge we move forward.
The WVDP is fighting for Democrats throughout the state. From candidate training and recruitment, to voter registration and turnout – we are putting in our all but we need a little help sometimes. Maintaining and raising resources to cover the costs of our efforts is a constant battle, and right now we’re asking for your help.
Will you donate today, and help the WVDP’s work towards a bluer West Virginia? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

clean_body: [] Friend, It is no secret that American’s have suffered needlessly. A politicized pandemic ravaged our nation as Republican leadership pretended it wasn’t real. That’s all about to change. Tomorrow afternoon President Biden is going to sign into law a 1.9 Trillion Dollar relief plan. With Democrats in charge, those suffering will be taken care of. With Democrats in charge we move forward. The WVDP is fighting for Democrats throughout the state. From candidate training and recruitment, to voter registration and turnout – we are putting in our all but we need a little help sometimes. Maintaining and raising resources to cover the costs of our efforts is a constant battle, and right now we’re asking for your help. Will you donate today, and help the WVDP’s work towards a bluer West Virginia? [] secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv] Thank you! Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP [] Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Vote Today
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_today&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **There's a vote happening today on the Rep Erik Mortensen Resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers.** Con Artists Julie Sandstede, Dave Lislegard, Mike Sundin and Paul Marquart have a choice: End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution before the One-Year Anniversary or give us more reason to hire additional doorknockers and field operators in their districts. We're dead serious about this issue. We can't allow one person to create unilateral orders in this state that infringe on our liberties any longer. If these vulnerable Democrats want to die on this hill, we're ready to meet them there. It's time these rural Democrats stop following orders from the radical, metro Democrats like Ryan Winkler, and stand up for their voters. And STOP wasting our time on Fake End Walz' Powers bills. **Did you know that Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard are crafting fake bills under the guise of ending Walz' powers? In fact, one of Sandstede's bills makes the mask mandate permanent, and continue to allow Walz to unilaterally declare emergency powers.** None of their bills have a Citizens’ Bill of Rights for emergencies or stop the Governor’s executive orders from being treated as law.
## They're Fake!
On the other hand, what liberty champion Erik Mortensen is doing will terminate Walz’ Emergency Powers immediately. That’s why it’s critically important for these politicians to vote YES TODAY on the Rep Mortensen Resolution to End Walz’ Emergency Powers
## Contact
### Julie Sandstede - 651-296-0172 - [rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn](mailto:rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn)
### Dave Lislegard - 651-296-0170 - [rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn](mailto:rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn)
### Mike Sundin - 651-296-4308 - [rep.mike.sundin@house.mn](mailto:rep.mike.sundin@house.mn)
### Paul Marquart - 651-296-6829 - [rep.paul.marquart@house.mn](mailto:rep.paul.marquart@house.mn)
Sample Script Rep _______, I’m contacting you to End Walz’ Emergency Powers by voting YES on the Mortensen Resolution. One Year of a unilaterally declared emergency is too long. We want our government back! Don’t allow Governor Walz to create orders anymore that lock us in our homes, force youth athletes to wear masks and shut down our economy. Please stop wasting our time with the Fake End Walz’ Powers bill in the Legislative Process Reform Committee. Do what’s right, and End Walz’ Emergency Powers now by voting YES on Rep Mortensen’s Resolution. Alternate Script Rep _______, I was so proud of you standing up to your Party last year and voting to End Walz’ Emergency Powers several times. It’s unfortunate that you betrayed us this year by reversing course and protecting Walz. Now we’re on the cusp of one whole year of his emergency and you are pretending like you’re solving the problem by crafting a Fake End Walz’ Powers Bill in the Legislative Process Reform Committee. Stop playing politics with our liberties and vote YES on the End Walz’ Emergency Powers Resolution this week. Stand up for rural Minnesota values; not Metro Democrat ones. Once you reach out to them, I’d love to hear from you. Feel free to email me and let me know you contacted these vulnerable Democrats. Don’t like calling or emailing? You can still be a huge help to us by [supporting](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_today&n=2) our field operations. We now have two places up north and a growing team of paid field staff who are contacting thousands of voters every week in the districts of these vulnerable Democrats. They just started doorknocking in Rep Mike Sundin's district this weekend. And they aren’t going anywhere as long as these politicians continue voting against us. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_today&n=3) **If you would like to help[fund our field operations](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_today&n=4), please click here to make a donation.** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_today&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_today&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_today&n=7), software for leaders.

# Latinos for America First WE NEED YOU!_**_
---
Latinos for America First is looking to put together a legislative team that will go testify in Texas during this session on behalf of important bills that we are advocating for: protecting religious liberties, election integrity, censorship, the border crisis etc. Please email hispanicengagementcommittee@gmail.com and let us know if you want to be added to our legislative team. This team will also be responsible for organizing or base to call all the elected officials to apply pressure on them to either vote for or against a bill. Our organization will be providing stipends for accommodations and travel expenses.
---
| | [ SIGN UP NOW ](mailto:hispanicengagementcommittee@gmail.com)
---
Sincerely: Latinos for America First

subject: Why should you pay for Pelosi’s next TV ad?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Do you stand against Pelosi’s latest partisan power grab? Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470298?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0bedf8405&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

How would you like the idea of funding Nancy Pelosi, AOC, or Chuck Schumer’s next political campaign ad? Well, that’s exactly what the Democrats’ latest partisan bill is going to force you to do!

They call it the “For the People” Act... but it’s a power grab bill that will take your tax dollars and funnel it right into the pockets of the radical left’s campaign coffers, so they can fund their TV ads, mailers, and campaign staff.

_That’s right — Democrats think that taxpayers should fund their campaigns._

Democrats across the country have already come out to support this measure, despite a complete lack of bipartisan support.

It is critical that we oppose this federal government takeover of our elections, and we must stop it before it gains any more traction in Washington.

It’s clear that Nancy Pelosi is on an unprecedented partisan power grab. It was rotten when she tried (and failed!) to pass it in 2019, and it’s just as bad now.

**Do you agree that we need to STOP H.R. 1 and send a message to Nancy Pelosi that we’re not going to let her get away with undermining American values and integrity?[Contribute now to help stop it from becoming reality. Or before you know it, YOU could be the one footing the bill for AOC’s next TV ad](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e266c77882&e=1acd9bb3d6)**.

\- Team IN GOP

name: NY Gov Alert
subject: Abandoning Andrew Cuomo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
The consensus is clear: Governor Cuomo has failed New York.
| |
---
The consensus is clear: Governor Cuomo has failed New York.
**Even Democrats are done with Cuomo!** New York lawmakers want to strip Governor Cuomo of the emergency powers he's been exercising through the pandemic, because it's clear Cuomo has gone too far.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VWh4J4U-siXZR8RtIY28MyVsLkQv0AaUndD1KDxludM3MsGLddeNZqOve5olXxFbPLOyESVjXTObpDL6De5g4WWSyELgFrfbE1RBumMup6V3Oaf_MJag8WUZrAvig2T8sbKB81_Sx_Epq5q2MjrtB32IlU123IPtwmAal-rIHIKBjt9VBIkIAeBOA91RD0Q_td6nz54y2Rj_-h96F8EdkPgAoGg1jnmcyOeE6qedxYnQD20WKqjOo6UeonEH2yI9vk3TcPedTjFuD2wfW8ia_SexPWUczG-j0ZK-mmT1uuR8qADk03lNpopxokUJEF18QPsWHWeFHmGVDTuytB8dxOKtz7XUEaqPHNVXzyRb2lqoJg1SFrtUEuEh4cj9h8OTnUa7Fg-_5qs-9pjS2z8Y-Z4uCxI7L4HzpL-xvvBAFRvY1g2XpCKuKA==&c=QYlIUu1VbFM75koDxXt_L8md_0LaGv_BLV0qlUoS9z6cluNBIyb0AA==&ch=SriiaVTQVAaujtbybn1YOo0gZyAnwFV9kw35Fs3mRUBj3QZFj-JdbQ==)

**Xavier Becerra has defended his socialist agenda of:**
* Medicare for All
* Abortion on demand
* Free taxpayer-funded health care for illegal immigrants

With decades of experience as a doctor, Chairman John Barrasso knows policies like Medicare for All will **DESTROY** your healthcare. That's why he's taking a stand against Xavier Becerra, and he's looking for a show of force.
**
Will you join him and sign his petition to REJECT socialist policies and Xavier Becerra? **

Becerra wants to transform our healthcare system to strip millions of their private health insurance and kill thousands of jobs. body:
I joined Fox News to talk about this Governor's lack of credibility to lead our great state. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9ab7294f850b/governor-cuomo-must-be-held-accountable?e=9f843ba602)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,

**Gov. Cuomo must be held accountable!** Yesterday, I joined [America Reports on Fox News](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=268d4b73d0&e=9f843ba602) to call for just that.

>> You can watch my interview with Fox News here:
---
| [ ](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=b2d3a99d20&e=9f843ba602)
---
| **This Governor is unfit to serve New Yorker.**

>> He has profited from the lies surrounding our state's nursing home crisis and 15,000 lost lives.

>> He has threatened to "destroy" sitting State Legislators.

>> He has been accused of sexual harassment by MULTIPLE women.

>> He has publicly smeared his accusers.

This Governor has displayed an utter indifference to his actions and no longer has the credibility to lead our great state. **_He has made it clear that he will not resign, so now, the State Legislature must move to impeach._**

Donate **[HERE](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=df7c74de46&e=9f843ba602)** to join our fight to make it happen!

\- Rob

body:
|

---
Friend, we are going to get right to the point:
**Democrats just launched a massive ad campaign targeting Marco Rubio**.
We can't stand by and let these attacks go unchallenged. Liberals have put a target on Marco's back and are beginning their strategic attack TODAY. We need YOU to stand up and back Marco before it's too late.

---
| | [Chip in $35 to our Advertising Fund](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y1SiNAEVM_qwiwSyer17p5Dm2aqFvv4MuRZiU5_wPoy0BsSvlsiHZcGc23A_Byj27hQtvrrSp9r_YoLCObL1vVjgXzy0SeXH5XNSW6wMxkoZZJ-vNPR2BfUVj_QZR_HkS4p1XdlB0mwpsxRsJL7RiFy8Pb8iSIQDdo3uh9i3gbjcyD3OY_rYvBgX249ee17Sh2qljcPzUAzsDLBQvQqhmMHZJPx-KjCdHuNnIbW6zqVCOP8JsvEJS5l4hDuvzeTZA5g4NOSznwigrqgU-m5Qprb6-37PHzoInRNQO64hkANqGzgX7s8NGRSEfn4wiH2ha9t8NnGxFGdMv-ZCF-AHf97NHa_R7K5fGfeY6DBJnCRuDJX1qF0NmxMym4XXTqlCjynmtEGZttanqKAQVrzYCWNXNQsOsP4FJlzjm06Dt8BMLDKojER5RH8mBFbZ7DyQKOD1JUIMAqq8ZSFFq-N6V58mIPc4W0IGALeq9Xxdt1ufNZTwn6fr4w==&c=FUA-7GqjG7ibHgVq62riPUe9jOGcitdiP6V6dnYk5S_8Y39JaER-3A==&ch=PeClj0eM9tmtQnICZ83oTWmr177hBuU8PgWsvxCFBlwxj2nr-uHEtA== "Chip in $35 to our Advertising Fund")
---

On top of this, we have 5 days until our Mid-Month Deadline, and this is our last chance to be on pace to reach our Quarter 1 Goal. If we can't reach our goals, we will have to rework budgets and delay going on air to respond to these attacks.

name: Michelle Steel
subject: My accent is a part of my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
My accent is a part of my story.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cYVRONKif7JSpSS0afhSymUbdTR6Kj0saCxXcu0NRQqKV_eO339cO1QUw6sO0u7es3CdV3IoUB48D5SQYuqXj-VlO88G6BNf-sul9d3MHo6Tk6YuxWB2DVtCcVk72dR3R9ewccChNkUrCEcDpeswKl-jglD4biT-91ez8dlyuivCqj6wPlzo9j6QeQDNDNs6ahXeenLLAR4uYaSG7ctny5aL9C4YkuYAmoCs7Qi1mfl0dfEHe1thk0HNvEJ79P6P-ysLIFOmKdb3MoMHFgKHHNhgx2KITEwjGRk2etDPG0_C-tcA5vo6LHBKBG4QRoFxjlMtpKgyuDragWJVt6OgPYkMofGXZBj1Lz5s-N0mn4go8z2b0w_1LG67ECQeqB__qWydXD1lR7qZhj1MK3UHyrqZwlA-_Gh4sLU---rUc2xTkS9iYjWG-Q==&c=nANQ4vV7mOJ3j3JSgsALHm43ogHZLBFef_BZgHHidla1vVVmhu4ImQ==&ch=rxH7Re86REqLO7Xu7oYlaKWLXjKJDRJZziDDyUAiGfvdMlBeWk9b-Q==)
**My accent is a part of who I am and is a part of my story.**

I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States as a young woman with my single mother. She and I embody the story of the American Dream: coming to the U.S., starting a small business, and supporting ourselves in the land of opportunity.

Soon after, however, I saw how a government agency harassed my mother with an unfair and unwarranted tax bill; she did not have the resources to put up a fight. **After seeing how the system was set up to penalize small businesses, I decided enough was enough.**

It has been my mission ever since to become California's taxpayer champion. So far, I have helped Californians by _returning over $400 million to taxpayers_ \-- and I won't stop there. I will work each day to do everything in my ability to put a stop to new taxes and to fight any tax increases.

But to do that, I need your help. [**Will you chip in $25 to help me stand up against the Far Left and their job-killing tax policies?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cYVRONKif7JSpSS0afhSymUbdTR6Kj0saCxXcu0NRQqKV_eO339cO6IlZ8mdFvpgEsE9XBFx91CW-Diw9ADqwUDtlCkeiY8akTf5Nrbb6MN5mK4AAZfKZ-FLM92c8L7ga5DacdJ1iBFc7eKRBPqp0BzUTCmVmNHXP3Cy_VsSCMWghXk9oEDffaqT6_sEGdfePg6rwKk4lgZiVH_nCgRt1d1dTtQBMq_g4XqCgU6RPl0ds4V9aP7m-09n1HbwfNhiSzC1MKB8G-hIvdg2wwcLgfoIzyIPvnbVS5Uaw2w2iUub9fA8dYIKeKf_CrA59eKFkOfv4Gsqsl1x9Jbl6aI2GJZH5CAX1U_j1qSdaXdKSyzq-0JV8f2E2AmQn12_WzXPMKld_XsQTHISRIclVKYNpVfUq6Evk3zmKnrSAAqg8VUNjSuDeygBLyWhNCYdgLgh&c=nANQ4vV7mOJ3j3JSgsALHm43ogHZLBFef_BZgHHidla1vVVmhu4ImQ==&ch=rxH7Re86REqLO7Xu7oYlaKWLXjKJDRJZziDDyUAiGfvdMlBeWk9b-Q==)

It's not easy to stand up against the deep pockets of the Democrats' dark money machine. Last year alone they outspent us 3 to 1. Next time around, they will spend even more. **Nancy Pelosi 's hand-picked candidate that we defeated last time has already vowed for a rematch... **

[**Can I count on your help to stand up to the Democrats ' dark money?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cYVRONKif7JSpSS0afhSymUbdTR6Kj0saCxXcu0NRQqKV_eO339cO1QUw6sO0u7es3CdV3IoUB48D5SQYuqXj-VlO88G6BNf-sul9d3MHo6Tk6YuxWB2DVtCcVk72dR3R9ewccChNkUrCEcDpeswKl-jglD4biT-91ez8dlyuivCqj6wPlzo9j6QeQDNDNs6ahXeenLLAR4uYaSG7ctny5aL9C4YkuYAmoCs7Qi1mfl0dfEHe1thk0HNvEJ79P6P-ysLIFOmKdb3MoMHFgKHHNhgx2KITEwjGRk2etDPG0_C-tcA5vo6LHBKBG4QRoFxjlMtpKgyuDragWJVt6OgPYkMofGXZBj1Lz5s-N0mn4go8z2b0w_1LG67ECQeqB__qWydXD1lR7qZhj1MK3UHyrqZwlA-_Gh4sLU---rUc2xTkS9iYjWG-Q==&c=nANQ4vV7mOJ3j3JSgsALHm43ogHZLBFef_BZgHHidla1vVVmhu4ImQ==&ch=rxH7Re86REqLO7Xu7oYlaKWLXjKJDRJZziDDyUAiGfvdMlBeWk9b-Q==)[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cYVRONKif7JSpSS0afhSymUbdTR6Kj0saCxXcu0NRQqKV_eO339cO1QUw6sO0u7es3CdV3IoUB48D5SQYuqXj-VlO88G6BNf-sul9d3MHo6Tk6YuxWB2DVtCcVk72dR3R9ewccChNkUrCEcDpeswKl-jglD4biT-91ez8dlyuivCqj6wPlzo9j6QeQDNDNs6ahXeenLLAR4uYaSG7ctny5aL9C4YkuYAmoCs7Qi1mfl0dfEHe1thk0HNvEJ79P6P-ysLIFOmKdb3MoMHFgKHHNhgx2KITEwjGRk2etDPG0_C-tcA5vo6LHBKBG4QRoFxjlMtpKgyuDragWJVt6OgPYkMofGXZBj1Lz5s-N0mn4go8z2b0w_1LG67ECQeqB__qWydXD1lR7qZhj1MK3UHyrqZwlA-_Gh4sLU---rUc2xTkS9iYjWG-Q==&c=nANQ4vV7mOJ3j3JSgsALHm43ogHZLBFef_BZgHHidla1vVVmhu4ImQ==&ch=rxH7Re86REqLO7Xu7oYlaKWLXjKJDRJZziDDyUAiGfvdMlBeWk9b-Q==)

clean_body: My accent is a part of my story. ** . == My accent is a part of who I am and is a part of my story. I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to the United States as a young woman with my single mother. She and I embody the story of the American Dream: coming to the U.S., starting a small business, and supporting ourselves in the land of opportunity. Soon after, however, I saw how a government agency harassed my mother with an unfair and unwarranted tax bill; she did not have the resources to put up a fight. After seeing how the system was set up to penalize small businesses, I decided enough was enough. It has been my mission ever since to become California's taxpayer champion. So far, I have helped Californians by returning over $400 million to taxpayers \-- and I won't stop there. I will work each day to do everything in my ability to put a stop to new taxes and to fight any tax increases. But to do that, I need your help. == It's not easy to stand up against the deep pockets of the Democrats' dark money machine. Last year alone they outspent us 3 to 1. Next time around, they will spend even more. Nancy Pelosi 's hand-picked candidate that we defeated last time has already vowed for a rematch... ** == | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == We've got an uphill battle ahead of us, but I know with your help we can keep this seat red and win back the House Majority for the Republicans. Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: It’s time we turn things around
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM JOSH,
body:
We're at a critical moment in American history.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011IUO4MeOqfh7ERWGW5IW8l7KJ4F1HUtz_IquWynpqzB3B0R9b927zKGCcl7Ech2rg6UYlxpapv22x5jGC_JXlK0HNHFEdIUfskZZuBFeqcukGzfr6HpAQ_rDH3AkDrkHa1ZhHKCO0Nu8gLOKUF2aR3xbQn53EIXNstzz-GvNYH-ihc-Khb4eSTMP5V2DTfZAbhuhCigC_MU3TXL_tN1VuOCQokEbzVYXGDMq0PgWOecjZUDLk6SsGqCWylLRiVSGGP9_0DJ0l1Oly1o4X-NlQ0JYWk3JovOiTo5AiKnUWkJHCtmpdblMsDVR_2GjontLHThcCgwYRQgPUWzdMLgUg0HH36XS434TafUtE8i64FoMQwnucMw-rTfiPVtCll3LQonmgbONjHSjLAHnyF3XCwv6d-UzDwqddYBSCJGTMP_uf7b98SNJzWfPIbt7y7rt&c=b6B7RdKcA5barY9jqt3iqOI3wmsbgWcqcRbK8XxcaB0CuMsls_EpeA==&ch=2jg5h9C9j5aHn0USUV9X24AaOxJmzWamOeMzzD3plX6i5RTj3Z1RuQ==) Friend,

**We 're at a critical moment in American history,** where our freedoms are being trampled on by our very own government. Establishment politicians on both sides of the aisle are stepping on our individual liberties with endless shutdowns of our small businesses, our schools, and our livelihoods. **It 's time we turn things around. **
**I 'm fighting tooth and nail to take on big government, because the hardworking men and women of Ohio and America deserve better. **
[**If YOU are with me in the fight for individual liberty, economic freedom, and for the working people of America, will you stand with me TODAY, Friend?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011IUO4MeOqfh7ERWGW5IW8l7KJ4F1HUtz_IquWynpqzB3B0R9b927zKGCcl7Ech2rg6UYlxpapv22x5jGC_JXlK0HNHFEdIUfskZZuBFeqcukGzfr6HpAQ_rDH3AkDrkHa1ZhHKCO0Nu8gLOKUF2aR3xbQn53EIXNstzz-GvNYH-ihc-Khb4eSTMP5V2DTfZAbhuhCigC_MU3TXL_tN1VuOCQokEbzVYXGDMq0PgWOecjZUDLk6SsGqCWylLRiVSGGP9_0DJ0l1Oly1o4X-NlQ0JYWk3JovOiTo5AiKnUWkJHCtmpdblMsDVR_2GjontLHThcCgwYRQgPUWzdMLgUg0HH36XS434TafUtE8i64FoMQwnucMw-rTfiPVtCll3LQonmgbONjHSjLAHnyF3XCwv6d-UzDwqddYBSCJGTMP_uf7b98SNJzWfPIbt7y7rt&c=b6B7RdKcA5barY9jqt3iqOI3wmsbgWcqcRbK8XxcaB0CuMsls_EpeA==&ch=2jg5h9C9j5aHn0USUV9X24AaOxJmzWamOeMzzD3plX6i5RTj3Z1RuQ==)

**It 's time we take back our freedom, Friend. Friend, Martin here from Team Young. Did you know CA-39 is currently the second bluest seat held by a conservative? It is. And we're on a mission to keep it that way. Nancy Pelosi is more determined than ever to win back our district and replace Young Kim with one of her Loyal, Far-Left Democrats. _In fact, a Far Left Liberal just launched his campaign to unseat her._ It's safe to say they will spend millions on ads, knock on every last door in the district, leaving no stone unturned to reach voters in every corner of CA-39. If we're going to defeat them -- _again_ \-- we can't be caught flat footed. That's why I'm coming to you asking for your support. name: Tim Scott
subject: This bill made Bernie Sanders BLUSH
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I was excited to speak with Trey Gowdy on "Fox News Primetime" this week and I want to share the same truth that I shared with him and his viewers: The new COVID relief bill is not about COVID relief. It is nothing but a progressive policy wish list. Watch my interview with Trey Gowdy to learn more.
Friend,

I was excited to speak with Trey Gowdy on "Fox News Primetime" this week and I want to share the same truth that I shared with him and his viewers:
**
The new COVID relief bill is not about COVID relief. It is nothing but a progressive policy wish list.[Watch my interview with Trey Gowdy to learn more.](secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/trey-gowdy-video-page/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210311_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1051316-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210311_this-bill-made-bernie-sanders-blush)**
[Watch My Interview](secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/trey-gowdy-video-page/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210311_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1051316-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210311_this-bill-made-bernie-sanders-blush)
---
**[](secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/trey-gowdy-video-page/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210311_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1051316-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210311_this-bill-made-bernie-sanders-blush)**

Bernie Sanders himself said this is the most progressive bill to ever pass the Senate since he's been in office. You know that says a lot when it makes Bernie Sanders blush!

Republican-led COVID relief bills passed back in 2020 helped struggling families and small businesses survive through the pandemic.

But most of this new bill, passed only by Democrats' votes, will go to bailing out blue states like California and paying for a progressive policy wish list.

Democrats are trying to use our 50-50 split in the Senate right now to ram through their terrible ideas under the guise of COVID relief. **We have to fight back.**

[**Watch my interview with Trey Gowdy to hear my full thoughts and help me fight back against this progressive wish list.**](secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/trey-gowdy-video-page/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210311_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1051316-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210311_this-bill-made-bernie-sanders-blush)

Tim Scott

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

body:
Friend,

It's no coincidence that as soon as Biden took office, there was a HUGE surge of immigrants coming into our country ILLEGALLY. Some of them even wore Biden shirts when they crossed the border!

Other countries know that with Biden in the White House, our country is **WEAK**.

Biden and his Democrat posse in Congress want to spend $4 BILLION in taxpayer dollars to "fix issues" in Latin America while thousands of illegal immigrants waltz over our Southern Border.

We can keep going with these insane facts, but we know you get the point...

body:
President Trump Made America Great Again. We had record low unemployment, the border was under control, and our economy was booming.
**President Trump Made America Great Again. **

subject: Free speech > internet trolls

body:
Did you watch Tucker Carlson last night?

********
Did you watch **Tucker Carlson** last night, Friend?

He told us some insane stories about the latest attacks on free speech.

In this day and age, having an opinion isn't allowed if a mob of internet trolls disagrees with you: you get silenced and canceled. That's what happened to a band member who gave a book review; a news host who gave his opinion; and a reality TV show host who, well, no one even knows what he did wrong.

They all lost their jobs and got "canceled" -- because they exercised their right to FREE SPEECH.

Friend, what do you think about that? **Do you think Leftist internet trolls should decide who has the right to voice their opinions online?**

[_**Take the survey ->**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJQn1I5eRdtWQJIUOYznmN7L4P8zflEsuaDwccF1RgwGuExDfaX0CvC5SoOhmUwRjXpOH5oHLZG5baAxkD769EvuGM1YQdO74svc0gsxHI5Nm_Nqj-9-4OmYZX6MBku--79V4t_B4_tKgPm1g8eQmJ8JeiF4AUc-bf9J_tJw2_-SFeZTA2WHkJgCMcTN8vQS3GOLty9mILNctxeYLOEjl32e9M-xaViej-WvL2CzsypILKFZelH8j-RaUwuXVzUv2hPQYG4YnksZ9tjszHHQVC6VFaJ3tVwleF5qYSj_3J-H2OkSXdrk9Ops1-WG42oj9i2Xh3EGoHfXdbNGBsPpWSId1pTj2OMO_6yqAVU7vuRcLN-TEfv-s3J5xmRrBvCENaehIj76kiP_8rnQ3TfUDpKyLjNK00fU&c=Ao3xKIMQi7dJhQ8o0bhNmE8yRYA03Fu9pUqWjFCIRmiiIrGIESy2xQ==&ch=Vfcj_9e7BthXnzFIk082Uhm754MgVXn4llKOZAX90tcvrhOyzc7PRg==)

[**Let us know if you agree!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJQn1I5eRdtWQJIUOYznmN7L4P8zflEsuaDwccF1RgwGuExDfaX0CvC5SoOhmUwRjXpOH5oHLZG5baAxkD769EvuGM1YQdO74svc0gsxHI5Nm_Nqj-9-4OmYZX6MBku--79V4t_B4_tKgPm1g8eQmJ8JeiF4AUc-bf9J_tJw2_-SFeZTA2WHkJgCMcTN8vQS3GOLty9mILNctxeYLOEjl32e9M-xaViej-WvL2CzsypILKFZelH8j-RaUwuXVzUv2hPQYG4YnksZ9tjszHHQVC6VFaJ3tVwleF5qYSj_3J-H2OkSXdrk9Ops1-WG42oj9i2Xh3EGoHfXdbNGBsPpWSId1pTj2OMO_6yqAVU7vuRcLN-TEfv-s3J5xmRrBvCENaehIj76kiP_8rnQ3TfUDpKyLjNK00fU&c=Ao3xKIMQi7dJhQ8o0bhNmE8yRYA03Fu9pUqWjFCIRmiiIrGIESy2xQ==&ch=Vfcj_9e7BthXnzFIk082Uhm754MgVXn4llKOZAX90tcvrhOyzc7PRg==)

[_**Defend free speech ->**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJQn1I5eRdtWQJIUOYznmN7L4P8zflEsuaDwccF1RgwGuExDfaX0CvC5SoOhmUwRjXpOH5oHLZG5baAxkD769EvuGM1YQdO74svc0gsxHI5Nm_Nqj-9-4OmYZX6MBku--79V4t_B4_tKgPm1g8eQmJ8JeiF4AUc-bf9J_tJw2_-SFeZTA2WHkJgCMcTN8vQS3GOLty9mILNctxeYLOEjl32e9M-xaViej-WvL2CzsypILKFZelH8j-RaUwuXVzUv2hPQYG4YnksZ9tjszHHQVC6VFaJ3tVwleF5qYSj_3J-H2OkSXdrk9Ops1-WG42oj9i2Xh3EGoHfXdbNGBsPpWSId1pTj2OMO_6yqAVU7vuRcLN-TEfv-s3J5xmRrBvCENaehIj76kiP_8rnQ3TfUDpKyLjNK00fU&c=Ao3xKIMQi7dJhQ8o0bhNmE8yRYA03Fu9pUqWjFCIRmiiIrGIESy2xQ==&ch=Vfcj_9e7BthXnzFIk082Uhm754MgVXn4llKOZAX90tcvrhOyzc7PRg==)

clean_body: Join Team Hinson in helping keep LA-05 republican. &zwnj == Friend, Republican Julia Letlow is in the most critical special election RIGHT NOW in Louisiana 's 5th district. This seat is a must-win for Republicans and right now Pelosi is doing everything she can to flip this seat blue. Her critical special election is coming up on March 20th -- we simply don 't have time to waste! This seat is a must-win to keep LA-05 red! == **== Julia Letlow is running for Congress to carry on the torch first lit by her late husband Luke, who passed away just days before he was supposed to be sworn into Congress. I know Julia will not only be an advocate for Louisiana, but she will be fighting alongside me and our historic GOP freshman class to put common-sense before Nancy Pelosi's radical agenda. Team Hinson is giving everything we can to help Julia win this election and we need YOU to join us! == == == == == == == Thank you for joining us, Friend, Congresswoman Ashley Hinson | Follow and Share us with your network! | ==| ==| == ---|---|--- == Text HINSON4CONGRESS to 47682 to receive text updates from our campaign! | | | | |
---

**Democrat-led states are crumbling under the oppressive lockdown measures their governors have enacted, and no governor has done more damage than California's Governor Gavin Newsom.**
********
Thanks to Newsom, California is currently facing record homelessness, housing shortages, rising crime, failing schools, unaffordable taxes, and arbitrary lockdowns. Newsom 's policies have destroyed the state and triggered a mass exodus.** **

**It 's time for Governor Newsom to GO and _we 've got less than two weeks_ to make it happen. [Will you pitch in today to help fund our efforts to fire Gavin Newsom?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018csdrzELTTuLyfqTTdsrunmAbGT9-ReADBwyndYy_UTxcHfJSjTeEBmLkXVuRanpi1juCZyerJ5sFno-YMGlFKSZqymHmNwtdRd_F7CzjVei3_jmnIW3GLuRDKjtbRBnEqzTOXkgY-8cIZQg66o4SV03QFEad3JNxuNte9VY9azmh_9j_o61FEbGjhyOG3OEVLNVxDAWBSyl-OPf6xIRzIAFJb0k7j5_paJFXMJHEikXgC3tMoMkbb78MDmVIDAHlJdazm6WXxtLrDzXyPpIShz_1T3BBldJyQB6YM7sZXWtCKlY5DpHpN4wGBHaxhDP-6DavKAAGBYGKxFwQFYztOglJxUzHA-ATmh6A2OZrUXdhNazStuE_RWSLpx6yIgbHSbBlNEUk9GGF1V1rFxd7vvyORiXABMAOt1Hgewkbu04uIzLfN6ngf0yuondfub2L0TOlbk2cYt1hre_hxv9kxzNNdsOhSf5WHgPPc201AzqmAu0r0k-uVhWvlAxOkGP&c=gzzhoQiPfkGDxRcmj_DveQncr6GB7sL98ROr7sxfj4N6xnuyMUHGyw==&ch=pvOsWEqxB_0d9yLH9NTXIxjmMeNcBYV90xRN3ccCtggk1KItzb1kMw==)**

It's going to take every last conservative to ensure Newsom is finally held accountable for the devastating impact he's had on millions who are under lockdown, unable to work, and struggling to pay their rent. clean_body: The consensus is clear: Governor Newsom has failed California. | | | | | Democrat-led states are crumbling under the oppressive lockdown measures their governors have enacted, and no governor has done more damage than California's Governor Gavin Newsom. Thanks to Newsom, California is currently facing record homelessness, housing shortages, rising crime, failing schools, unaffordable taxes, and arbitrary lockdowns. Newsom 's policies have destroyed the state and triggered a mass exodus. It 's time for Governor Newsom to GO and we 've got less than two weeks to make it happen. == == You may not live in California, but here 's why your support is critical: We can send a powerful message to every liberal in America, telling them that their policies are failures, and if they continue down the path of socialism, we will vote them out of office. If we== the governor of California, the bluest state in America, every Democrat is going to take notice.** It's going to take every last conservative to ensure Newsom is finally held accountable for the devastating impact he's had on millions who are under lockdown, unable to work, and struggling to pay their rent. == == Thank you for your help, RGA Action | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by the Recall Newsom! name: Greg Stanton
subject: We need to talk about the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Although unknown to many Americans, over the last several years the Supreme Court has altered its procedure for deciding some of its cases. It has resulted in less clarity and transparency for the American public, and has been referred to as a s _hadow docket_.

[**Will you sign the petition below to support a bipartisan review of the _shadow docket_?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vGu2Cgb6tdshZMTU_JxI79txImNHdfrKxybPeeK_yiE=/8HE3BCC-qmAIvOErHEVxYZP6wIBVaJua2TjtlMMr8Dw=)

While it is very important who sits on the bench, it is also critically important how the Supreme Court operates. Unfortunately this issue does not always get news coverage. The Supreme Court should be fair, transparent, and uphold the law for all Americans. Many Republicans and Democrats agree, and are calling for bipartisan reforms.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vGu2Cgb6tdshZMTU_JxI79txImNHdfrKxybPeeK_yiE=/8HE3BCC-qmAIvOErHEVxYZP6wIBVaJua2TjtlMMr8Dw=)

[The _shadow docket_ can have far-reaching consequences for our entire country. Even though we are fighting back with a bipartisan coalition, I still need your help. Will you sign onto this petition calling for SCOTUS reform?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vGu2Cgb6tdshZMTU_JxI79txImNHdfrKxybPeeK_yiE=/8HE3BCC-qmAIvOErHEVxYZP6wIBVaJua2TjtlMMr8Dw=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vGu2Cgb6tdshZMTU_JxI79txImNHdfrKxybPeeK_yiE=/8HE3BCC-qmAIvOErHEVxYZP6wIBVaJua2TjtlMMr8Dw=)

Thank you,

\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/vGu2Cgb6tdshZMTU_JxI79txImNHdfrKxybPeeK_yiE=/7SJrH2lcm7d5Lc5SkUU05grlpODA0ABTwuiKeEUbT2s=).

body:

Friend, I wanted let you know just how close we are to regaining the House Majority:

**We 're only 5 SEATS away from flipping the House.** Democrats are on their heels. Right now, they're launching a MASSIVE campaign blitz to try and ruin our momentum.

**Friend, we have a plan to retake the House from Democrats these midterms, but we can 't do it without your help.** We need all of our grassroots donors to step up and help us combat the massive money campaigns being used on the left. clean_body: I wanted let you know just how close we are to regaining the House Majority: Friend, I wanted let you know just how close we are to regaining the House Majority: The last open House race has been WON by Conservatives. This is huge. It shows that more and more Americans are seeing the Democrats' dangerous agenda for what it really is. We 're only 5 SEATS away from flipping the House. Democrats are on their heels. Right now, they're launching a MASSIVE campaign blitz to try and ruin our momentum. Friend, we have a plan to retake the House from Democrats these midterms, but we can 't do it without your help. We need all of our grassroots donors to step up and help us combat the massive money campaigns being used on the left. They think the massive donations they get from the liberal elite will be enough to silence the average American, but I know we can prove them wrong. == It's the donations from patriots like yourself that keep our movement alive. == == == == == == We're SO CLOSE to retaking the Majority and putting this country back on track, but we can't do it without supporters like you. D.C. Democrats are out of control.

Friend,
D.C. Democrats are trying to push a radical, far-left agenda onto hard-working Americans. Their COVID-19 "Relief" bill is anything but that, spending only 9% on actual COVID relief. Most of the money won't even be available for months!
The worst part... they approved **$350 BILLION of YOUR taxpayer dollars to go towards a blue state bailout for Andrew Cuomo and Gavin Newsom in NY and CA**.
[_**Do you agree with this radical plan?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LwFaenJVh-blMmC1MalFVqRlFLVFWepLOxARfATjz64auNWkbQUJnw3m8se7IUNvYE1YBg9Yjt0qGAZ3rfWQG1MRw4gINFNOMTyfRI5yfgDbm3GV2u4Yzgt2kk1xs1oXafhe3Ie9OL9NsEcyiPtSON2uVL4QZ946YKn7-4jHH8Z699Nj-fnyXgOEqc12mGo0-BSpJu2Id8dTbfMqYAOdeTmOZIQZ3r-F_CXXbIXBl5fLfYD24OaXHVyCYqb7H-7Tqw8wx4bFacbwxMMZzTa_dSSi_o-6V7p7LyYmvdL1GuuzTFoJWpFaPbjv8rkTelVytZdS4RAMDbNhV9n2QtlQwZV2AIaWoKSjdW2vtijseIACPFyiNqao9NOZlXvhoVSptSQOxMKzzAhWNoPPNh8-NF_edRMspj7_pRLDxHQGibKgQCmJtG2c1og-mbSeWPmmaPS2ipMK9Hp3isRU3g4SPs3df93byrTu4kAsoZ0Ow0r8oXkwfWOdSvS8Dbqs2o81&c=5hDQVEMO-t9RfEOznyYGsi2kZf-g81EiEBVzDejgV90grUzxnLvtFg==&ch=OzO2--MuCynV8p2J0DoNKRp6f-CrVvftEvSUVa2D9zwoCmbixAPbQw==)
I was proud to stand alongside 21 conservative Governors against this plan.
Why should our tax dollars go towards further funding the failures of California and New York? The answer is it shouldn't.
I'm counting on your help to join me in standing up to Washington D.C.'s radical plan. clean_body: D.C. Democrats are out of control. == Friend, D.C. Democrats are trying to push a radical, far-left agenda onto hard-working Americans. Their COVID-19 "Relief" bill is anything but that, spending only 9% on actual COVID relief. Most of the money won't even be available for months! The worst part... they approved $350 BILLION of YOUR taxpayer dollars to go towards a blue state bailout for Andrew Cuomo and Gavin Newsom in NY and CA. == I was proud to stand alongside 21 conservative Governors against this plan. Why should our tax dollars go towards further funding the failures of California and New York? The answer is it shouldn't. I'm counting on your help to join me in standing up to Washington D.C.'s radical plan. == == == == == == == == Thank you, Gov. Kim Reynolds Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=57932b53f6964b35aef62b4d9a23f397&_e=o-72vqsTxYAcJuyKEpACfJRArhtZ9ytmyHuuBjHXYget8GVjrdqqu7p3MIdvcmswnQeGKUckXjrB8xeCxXUxshSTDqjbxY1bC_VmAP3tX72Rb573VXEbaXkmoTPpcofdTbmepvdfM5VQntP4YWbf3HgG6fXxXHlSi6hekqY8o4xfDzK4T3wAZ4pNREXD4mlNb1Sr9segmMwjQz8e43xBao_8asU-ZKLS_kGE_L-kBT5bqwXuWD5IK20WbieBvMjaUbPzxAQYKKajI3WU11IA1CZd7juLtpK2xu5mT51wbMdqdI8ZOs4M5wrU8fD7ejRI9DNNtViNxAUVsTK_fudGIdInBiIBOyJz_LBYCOvhGU8%3D) | |

Peter,
Our southern border is approaching a full-blown crisis, and the Biden Admin’s response is... **NOTHING.**

This crisis was created by Joe Biden’s reckless and dangerous immigration policies.

On **DAY ONE** , Joe Biden signed an Executive Order opening our southern border, “Proclamation on the Termination Of Emergency With Respect To The Southern Border Of The United States...”

In February, he used another Executive Order to “Develop a Strategy to Address Irregular Migration Across the Southern Border...”

There is a **HUMANITARIAN CRISIS** on our southern border fueled by Joe Biden’s policies and rhetoric.

Donald Trump is right when he says, “Our country is being destroyed at the southern border...”

The media may try to continue to ignore this **FULL BLOWN CRISIS** , but I won’t be silent. Biden’s policies aren't empathetic, they're reckless, and our national security is at stake.

**I won't let Joe Biden get away with ignoring the CRISIS HE CREATED!**

Join with me, and donate — **Every dollar helps fight against the dangerous policies coming from the White House.**

name: Bill Olson
subject: Biden, Dems want to steal all future elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA
- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by liberal Congressman Darren Soto.

Let's be clear: The 2020 election was stolen. And not just from Trump, but also in Congress.

Pelosi has only a small majority of 5 seats in Congress- a very unruly majority, with the difference made by seats decided in close races in states with suspicious votes- Arizona, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, Georgia.

So Pelosi is passing absolutely horrific legislation- real "tyranny of the majority" type stuff - with a stolen majority.

Let's review some what what Pelosi has done with the barest of stolen majorities:

1. Pushed through what Marjorie Taylor Greene calls "the Blue State Bailout Bill": a $2 trillion list of liberal priorities, much of which doesn't even get spent this year (and hence won't help the economy). This bill gives illegal immigrants and convicted felons, death row inmates, $1400 checks.

2. Passed a bill to punish biblical Christians, and mandate giving gender-altering drugs to 3 and 4 year old children, if they request it.

3. Passed a bill to mandate removal of firearms from law abiding Americans, and registration of all weapons with the Federal Government.

4. Gutted funding for ICE.

As you can see, Pelosi is not wasting her chance to pass radical and nutty legislation. And my opponent, Darren Soto, voted for every single one of these.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=9Vc34BuZhtTS9a7CyKTKpQ

But her latest, the "For the People Act", is her attempt to make stealing elections permanent and legal.

Here is what this Act does:

-Lets felons and 16 year olds vote. Sure, they were eating Tide Pods last year, but the Dems want them to vote now.

-Makes it illegal to scrub voter lists of dead voters, illegal aliens, or voters who moved.

-Invalidates Voter ID laws in whatever states have them.

-Mandates increased mail-in balloting.

Now you understand what Pelosi is trying to do? She wants to take the worst parts of the steal from 2020- the ones everyone caught- and make them legal.

America would become a one-party Socialist state if that happened. We MUST not allow it!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA

This is serious. Pelosi really does want to destroy the country on her way out.

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and coming close. This time I'm starting early so I'll have the money to do even better!

Darren Soto hates the President and is nothing but a puppet for Nancy Pelosi. Help me beat him- so I can get to Congress and stop Pelosi's election steal!

I am an America First patriot, and I will vote with the Constitution, every time. I spent my life defending it, and I will do so in Congress!

Help me take a stand! Pelosi can be beaten. Canyou help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2900 per individual, $5800 per couple?

I won't ever let them steal another election - with your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=gQjLj1ZL1b8vIic&b=sUrS1y.XDsehMdvr78uPfA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:

clean_body: We just took a big step forward in our fight to count all the ballots in Iowa’s 2nd congressional district: | = = Peter, we have news: Yesterday, the U.S. House committee overseeing this case voted to move forward with Rita’s contest. This is a big deal. At least 22 Iowans’ legally-cast votes have yet to be counted in this race. For months, we’ve been fighting to make sure these Iowans have their voices heard, and now we’re one step closer to counting all the votes. Peter: When those ballots are counted, Rita will be ahead by nine votes. This decision is an important step forward, but our fight to count every vote in this historically close race is far from over. Our opponent is going to keep trying everything she can to stop these votes from being counted, so we can’t sit back now. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We have a little more work ahead of us, but after yesterday’s decision, we’re more confident than ever that we will win this contest in the end. name: Moms Off The Sidelines
subject: Senator Kirsten Gillibrand Wants Us to Get Off the Sidelines!
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130250/276000732/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=&emci=b2c10313-c482-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=e7d45168-d082-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131) [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130251/276000733/322201856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=) **Get Off the Sidelines** March is Women's History Month and amazing things can happen when women support women. Hi Peter, Off The Sidelines is Senator Kirsten Gillibrand’s call to action to encourage every woman and girl to make their voice heard on the issues they care about. Raising your voice truly can change the world. **[Moms in Office is proud to partner with and support Senator Kirsten Gillibrand in our mission to elect more women, especially moms.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130252/276000734/258311034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=&emci=b2c10313-c482-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=e7d45168-d082-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131)** Earlier this week, President Biden signed the American Rescue Plan into law. The bill goes beyond stimulus checks and makes education, as well as childcare a priority by expanding the child tax credit and by making a significant investment into childcare. **[The passage of the American Rescue Plan is a victory for women, but we need to continue our fight beyond the end of this crisis and sign these measures into law permanently.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130253/276000735/-351760232?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=&emci=b2c10313-c482-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=e7d45168-d082-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131)** I spoke to Senator Gillibrand exactly a year ago in Los Angeles right before COVID-19 shut down our economy and brought our lives to a halt. We could not have imagined that a year later we would be still trying to dig ourselves out of this mess and witness such a dramatic drop in women's labor force participation rates that may take us years to recover. We did know about the persistent gender inequalities in our country long before the pandemic-- this is why we have been fighting to give all women the economic justice they deserve all along. Senator Gillibrand has been at the forefront of this fight for years and one of her goals is to make paid family leave permanent so that all workers could have access to paid leave. I am proud to stand with her in solidarity and I hope that you will [**join me**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130254/276000736/322201856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=) in support so that we could elect more women to Congress who will vote for these important bills. **The time to act is now. ** **[Will you join me in support and pitch in to help us elect more women to office who know firsthand what working families are up against?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130255/276000737/322201856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=) ** **Peter** , I am coming to you personally because I need your **[help](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130256/276000738/322201856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=)**. As a single mom raising a young child, it is my priority that he grows up in a world that is more just and equal and it is also my privilege to speak for the millions of parents across the country who need our help. Together, we can train and elect candidates who will fight for progressive policies-- women who truly represent us and not the interest of corporations. **But, I can't do this without you, Peter.** **Every Dollar Makes a Difference.** Thank you for your support! Simona Grace Founder, Moms in Office [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26130257/276000739/322201856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZDQ1MTY4LWQwODItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnJM2yDyQiAain_103zaTqPsTF-4h2peVUjc05UASgY=) name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: The American People Want Results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
The Democrats are playing partisan games. | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

Congressman LaTurner is working hard in DC to get results for hardworking Kansans.

**However, the Democrats are simply focused on partisan games.**

In times of crisis like this, our leaders in Washington need to come together and get things done. Instead, the left is working on a** job-killing wishlist to appease the far-left.**
---
| _Republicans are ready to get something done, but here's what the Democrats are focused on._

**1.[Funding abortions abroad](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=622f7f0be3&e=1050d051da) with your taxpayer dollars** **2.[Welcoming illegal immigrants into our country](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=52ecbc8805&e=1050d051da) with no accountability** **3.[Raising the minimum wage](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c1a93468f8&e=1050d051da), while destroying small business** **4.[Killing well-paying oil jobs](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=54ef2461e3&e=1050d051da), and increasing our reliance on Russia and the Middle East for oil**
---
| [Chip in $50 to help us fight back](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=406cabb7e9&e=1050d051da "Chip in $50 to help us fight back")
---
| Instead, we should be focusing on issues like **_fully reopening the economy, getting a vaccine to all who want one, and reopening schools._**

Congressman LaTurner and Congressional Republicans are working hard for you, which is why we need to ensure we can win back the House in 2022, to **ensure the American people are never left out in the cold by our leaders again.**

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---
|

name: Flip CA-25
subject: Mike voted AGAINST sending relief checks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

For the second time this month, Mike Garcia voted AGAINST sending our communities the relief we need through the American Rescue Plan.

In fact, not only did Mike vote **no** on relief, he joined in Marjorie Taylor Greene's (Q-GA) ploy to try to prevent the House from considering the American Rescue Plan at all.

It's clear that he's in politics for his own partisan gain -- _not_ the people of the 25th district. We deserve better.

**[If you agree, please chip in $5 or whatever makes sense to you to send him packing.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b139/29776869/8683fc8/569d1a76/851272284/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMTFfY292aWRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210311_covid_in")**

Mike Garcia said of the bill, "Americans deserve actual relief, not a bill that sends their hard-earned taxpayer dollars to fund partisan pet projects." Well, Mike, this is what you voted against:

* Sending direct economic aid to families ❌
* Cutting child poverty in half ❌
* Expanding unemployment benefits during the pandemic ❌
* Renewing the Paycheck Protection Program ❌
* Supplying education grants ❌
* Extending support to low-income families ❌
* Providing the resources our public health programs need to fight COVID-19 ❌

Do these _really_ sound like partisan pet projects? Mike Garcia has proved that he's _totally useless._ He has to go.

**[Please, chip in $25 or any amount to flip CA-25 back to blue.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b139/29776869/8683fc8/569d1a76/851272284/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMTFfY292aWRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210311_covid_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b139/29776869/8683fc8/569d1a77/851272284/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMTFfY292aWRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210311_covid_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b139/29776869/8683fc8/569d1a70/851272284/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMV8yMTAzMTFfY292aWRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2103_email_christy?refcode=em21_210311_covid_in&express_lane=true&amount=25")
